tasks.title: Mempool Multi-Token Pipeline & High-Precision Engine
tasks.description: Implementation of the backend data structures and high-precision arithmetic required to track VAR and SKA tokens in the mempool. Includes the logic for block space allocation and the 4-color status engine.

tasks.title: Mempool Real-time Visual Indicators
tasks.description: Development of the interactive mempool section on the home page. Includes SCSS components, dynamic template rendering for multiple coin types, and Stimulus controller updates for WebSocket-driven real-time updates.

tasks.title: Core: Extend Mempool Models for SKA Awareness
tasks.description: Modify MempoolTx in mempool/collector.go to include CoinType (uint8) and SKAAmount (*big.Int). Update MempoolInfo to include CoinStats map[uint8]CoinTxStats to carry per-coin aggregates.

tasks.title: Collector: Implement SKA Detection in mempoolTxns
tasks.description: Update the mempoolTxns loop to inspect msgTx.TxOut for v.SKAValue. Populate the new SKA fields if detected. Ensure zero-overhead for standard VAR transactions.

tasks.title: Aggregator: Implement big.Int precision in ParseTxns
tasks.description: Refactor ParseTxns to accumulate totalOut and totalSize per coin type using map[uint8]*big.Int. Prevent rounding errors by avoiding float64 conversion until the final broadcast step.

tasks.title: Engine: Implementation of 4-Color Allocation Logic
tasks.description: Implement the logic from MAIN_MANIFEST.md 5.2: 10% space for VAR, 90%/N for SKAs. Calculate 'Gray' (free space) and 'Yellow/Red' overflow states based on current mempool density.

tasks.title: SCSS: Define Status Colors and Fill-Bar Animations
tasks.description: Add $mempool-green, -yellow, -red, and -gray to _variables.scss. Create .indicator-fill component in public/scss/ with 1s ease-in-out transition for height and background-color. Apply will-change: height for GPU acceleration.

tasks.title: Template: Refactor home.tmpl for Dynamic Indicator List
tasks.description: Update views/home.tmpl to loop over .Mempool.CoinFills. Implement a hidden <template> tag to allow the Stimulus controller to inject new SKA indicators dynamically if they appear in the mempool.

tasks.title: Stimulus: Update mempool_controller.js for Multi-Token WS
tasks.description: Extend the onMessage handler to parse the new CoinStats payload. Logic should update indicator heights and color classes based on coin-id. Use requestAnimationFrame for smooth bulk updates.
